description: git-branch-slug converts branch names with slashes to underscore-separated slugs
steps: Call git-branch-slug with feat/my-feature
Verify output is feat_my-feature
Call git-branch-slug with feat/scope/deep
Verify output is feat_scope_deep
Call git-branch-slug with main
Verify output is main unchanged

description: git-worktree-create uses git-branch-slug for slug generation
steps: Create a worktree with a branch name containing a slash
Verify the worktree directory name uses underscores instead of slashes

description: git-worktree-is-ralph exits 0 inside a ralph worktree
steps: Create a temporary git worktree on branch feat/test-ralph
Create docs/feat_test-ralph/prd.json inside the worktree
Run git-worktree-is-ralph from inside the worktree
Verify exit code is 0

description: git-worktree-is-ralph exits 1 inside a worktree without prd.json
steps: Create a temporary git worktree
Do not create any prd.json
Run git-worktree-is-ralph
Verify exit code is 1

description: git-worktree-is-ralph exits 1 outside any worktree
steps: Run git-worktree-is-ralph from a non-worktree git repo
Verify exit code is 1

description: git-worktree-is-ralph accepts an explicit path argument
steps: Create a temporary git worktree with docs/<slug>/prd.json
Run git-worktree-is-ralph with an explicit subpath inside the worktree
Verify exit code is 0

description: ralph-directory returns an absolute path to the ralph prd dir
steps: Create a temporary git worktree on branch feat/my-feat
Create docs/feat_my-feat/prd.json inside the worktree
Run ralph-directory from inside the worktree
Verify the output is an absolute path ending in docs/feat_my-feat/
Verify the path starts with /

description: ralph-directory exits 1 when not in a ralph worktree
steps: Run ralph-directory from a non-worktree git repo
Verify exit code is 1 and output is empty

description: ralph-directory accepts an optional path argument
steps: Create a temporary ralph worktree
Run ralph-directory with an explicit subpath inside the worktree
Verify the returned absolute path is correct

description: ralph-progress outputs done▮total for a valid prd.json
steps: Create a prd.json with 3 items: 1 with passes true, 2 with passes false
Run ralph-progress with that directory
Verify output is 1▮3

description: ralph-progress counts only passes == true (boolean strict)
steps: Create a prd.json with items having passes: true, passes: false, and passes: null
Run ralph-progress
Verify only the true entry is counted as done

description: ralph-progress exits 1 for an empty array
steps: Create a prd.json containing []
Run ralph-progress with that directory
Verify exit code is 1

description: ralph-progress exits 1 for malformed JSON
steps: Create a prd.json containing invalid JSON
Run ralph-progress with that directory
Verify exit code is 1

description: ralph-progress deduces directory from worktree context when called with no argument
steps: Create a temporary ralph worktree with a valid prd.json
Run ralph-progress with no arguments from inside the worktree
Verify it outputs the correct done▮total

description: ralph-end uses ralph-progress and correctly detects PRD completion
steps: Create a ralph worktree with a prd.json where all passes are true
Run ralph-end on that directory
Verify ralph-state prd_done is set to true

description: git_issues_github shows nothing in a worktree context
steps: Navigate to a git worktree
Trigger prompt refresh
Verify git_issues_github prompt part is empty

description: git_issues_prd shows yellow progress in a ralph worktree with issues in progress
steps: Navigate to a ralph worktree with prd.json containing mixed passes values
Trigger prompt refresh
Verify git_issues_prd prompt part shows done/total with COLOR_ALIAS_GIT_ISSUE color

description: git_issues_prd shows green progress when all issues are complete
steps: Navigate to a ralph worktree with prd.json where all passes are true
Trigger prompt refresh
Verify git_issues_prd prompt part shows done/total with COLOR_ALIAS_SUCCESS color

description: git_issues_prd shows red error icon for malformed prd.json
steps: Navigate to a ralph worktree with a malformed prd.json
Trigger prompt refresh
Verify git_issues_prd prompt part shows error icon with COLOR_ALIAS_ERROR color

description: git_issues_prd shows nothing in a non-ralph worktree
steps: Navigate to a worktree without prd.json
Trigger prompt refresh
Verify git_issues_prd prompt part is empty
